overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game depicting exploration of an ancient Greek leader's house. The player character walks through stone courtyards with mosaic floors, enters interior rooms with wooden furniture, and enjoys panoramic views of a Mediterranean coastal city with snow-capped mountains in the distance. The scene features classical architecture with decorative urns, fabric canopies, and multi-level terraces overlooking the sea.

agents.ego_description: walking through a stone doorway onto a sunlit terrace, approaching the entrance to the leader's house

entered.detail: large stone frame with decorative geometric patterns leading to the terrace
blue and gold fabric awning providing shade over the terrace
intricate geometric patterned stone tiles covering the terrace floor
large painted ceramic urn with ornate handles placed near the entrance
rectangular wooden planter box with blooming flowers

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a view through a stone doorway onto a sunlit terrace. The camera moves forward under a blue fabric canopy, approaching the main entrance of a stone building. Decorative terracotta urns and wooden planters with flowers line the path, while intricate mosaic tiles cover the ground.

exiting the interior back to the exterior terrace

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a dimly lit interior storage room with wooden ceiling beams and mosaic floors. An armored guard with a distinctive blue crested helmet walks among wooden chests and crates. After a brief look around, the camera exits back to the bright exterior terrace.

segments.scene_description: Moving along the terrace, the camera reaches the railing overlooking a stunning panoramic view of the Mediterranean Sea. A large olive tree stands at the terrace edge while the distant coastal city and snow-capped mountains are visible across the water. The stone railing features decorative circular patterns.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper terrace with decorative screens and seating

agents.ego_description: walking around the upper terrace, passing decorative architectural elements and a civilian standing near an urn

segments.scene_description: The camera continues exploring the upper terrace, passing a wooden lattice screen and a blue fabric hammock. A woman in a blue dress stands near a large red urn. The terrace features red flowering bushes, stone benches, and views of terracotta roof tiles on adjacent buildings.

events.description: entering a second interior room with mosaic floors and wooden dining furniture

agents.ego_description: entering a furnished interior room and looking around at the mosaic floors, wooden table, and decorative wall patterns

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a second interior room, this one a dining area with a long wooden table covered in blue cloth. The room features mosaic floors, decorative wall patterns, and storage amphorae. Light streams in through lattice windows, illuminating the space.

segments.scene_description: Exiting the dining room, the camera walks around the exterior of the building and descends a stone staircase to a lower courtyard level. The area features a sunken pool, large potted plants, and offers a different perspective of the house facade.

large round woven baskets for grain or goods storage
wooden shelves holding various items

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the camera entering a storage room from the lower courtyard. The dimly lit interior contains large woven storage baskets, wooden shelving, and mosaic tile flooring, suggesting this is a utility or pantry area of the house.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a luxurious Greek estate, transitioning from sun-drenched upper terraces to the dim utility spaces of the lower courtyard. It begins by passing under a blue fabric canopy and across mosaic tiles toward a stone building, briefly dipping into a dimly lit storage room where an armored guard stands among wooden crates before returning to the bright exterior. As the camera reaches the terrace railing, the view expands into a panoramic vista of the Mediterranean Sea, coastal cities, and snow-capped mountains, then drifts past a blue hammock and a woman in a blue dress toward a dining area illuminated by lattice windows. The scene then shifts as the camera exits the dining room and descends a stone staircase to a lower courtyard featuring a sunken pool and potted plants. Finally, the movement concludes by entering a shadowed lower storage room filled with woven baskets and wooden shelving.
